description_long: This object consists of two square decorative cushions, each featuring a black fabric base adorned with a large, intricate palm leaf motif in beige or gold tones. The cushions are bordered with ornate gold trim and tassels at each corner, adding a luxurious and elegant touch. The surface appears soft and plush, suggesting a comfortable filling inside. The palm leaf design is embroidered, giving the cushions a textured and high-end appearance. Both cushions are slightly puffed, indicating they are well-stuffed and likely to retain their shape. These cushions would be suitable for upscale outdoor or indoor urban seating areas, such as park benches or patio lounges.
description: A pair of black square cushions with gold palm leaf embroidery and ornate gold trim, featuring plush, soft surfaces and decorative tassels at each corner.
description_view_0: Two black cushions with gold palm leaf embroidery and gold trim, tassels visible at the corners, both cushions lying flat and slightly overlapping.
description_view_1: The cushions are seen from a rotated angle, showing the gold trim and tassels more prominently, with the palm leaf design partially visible.
description_view_2: Both cushions are viewed from another side, highlighting the embroidered palm leaf pattern and the plushness of the fabric.
description_view_3: The cushions are seen from a further rotated perspective, emphasizing the gold trim and the full palm leaf embroidery on the top surfaces.
attribute_location: outdoor patio lounge or upscale park bench
attribute_placement: placed side by side on a bench or lounge seat
